_comment: Text-derived metrics system (Gap B). Per CALENDAR YEAR, from the human-in-the-loop Google Voice classification (personal account; see FFC-Cloudflare-Automation docs/runbooks/google-voice-metrics.md). 2023-2025 are a FULL CENSUS: every thread was individually classified by party (volunteer/newCharity/existingCharity/noise), and every charity-org thread (newCharity + existingCharity) was individually assigned one product category — no sampling, no ratio extrapolation, no template-shaping. Totals are exact (pagination exhausted). Net-new reach-outs are DISTINCT first-contact senders deduped ACROSS all three years by first-appearance year (a contact first seen in 2023 is not recounted in 2024/2025), giving the velocity. 'charityThreads' = newCharity + existingCharity; volunteer threads are counted separately in byParty. 2026 is YTD pending the same census pass.

2023.confidence: Full census: all 1999 threads individually classified by party from subject + snippet (~20 ambiguous threads deep-read to resolve); every charity thread individually categorized (no extrapolation). ~86% is noise (personal/family + day-job). Net-new reach-outs are distinct first-contact senders deduped across 2023-2025 by first appearance (19 volunteer, 21 newCharity).

2024.confidence: Full census: all 1874 threads individually classified by party (53 ambiguous threads deep-read); every charity thread individually categorized (no extrapolation). ~86% is noise (personal/family + day-job). Net-new reach-outs deduped across 2023-2025 (5 volunteer, 5 newCharity) — small because most 2024 charity contacts first appeared in 2023.

2025.confidence: Full census: all 2078 threads individually classified by party (60 ambiguous threads deep-read), replacing the earlier sample-calibrated figures; every charity thread individually categorized (no extrapolation). ~70% is noise. Net-new reach-outs deduped across 2023-2025 (21 volunteer, 16 newCharity).
